title: stelis acostaei
intro: Stelis acostaei, also known as the False Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Stelis acostaei include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis acostaei can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are typically used topically to treat skin issues and wounds.
